productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Pretty Blossom Blue Top
description: Style Note Light summer pastel colours on your little diva - keep her happy, cool and comfortable this summer. This Gini & Jony tee is perfect for the summer (it's sleeveless!) and can be worn inside a zip-up sweater during the winter. Now what's not to love? Product Details Aqua blue and white sleeveless top with a round neck, has print on the chest and paneling on the chest Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery
